Computer-Assisted Reporting Newsletter, 1990–2007

Society of Environmental Journalists notice

October 1998
Health & EnvironmentJournalism & NewsroomTechnology

The Society of Environmental Journalists offers a comprehensive web resource hosted on IRE's website, providing journalists with topic-organized environmental links, story idea tip sheets, archived content, event calendars, and membership information.

CONNECT TO THE SOCIETY OF ENVIRONMENTAL JOURNALISTS VIA IRE's WWW.REPORTER.ORG WEB SITE, WHICH HOSTS A VARIETY OF JOURNALISM SITES.

SERVICES OF THE SEJ WEB PAGES INCLUDE:

EXTENSIVE LINKS TO OTHER ENVIRONMENTAL WEB SITES, ORGANIZED BY TOPICS (SUCH AS BIOTECHNOLOGY, ENERGY, OR STRATOSPHERIC OZONE LAYER), PLUS A LISTING OF ENVIRONMENTAL DATABASES AND MAILING LISTS

BIWEEKLY TIP SHEETS TO GENERATE STORY IDEAS AND AN ARCHIVE OF PRIOR TIP SHEETS

BACK ISSUES OF THE SEJOURNAL

CALENDAR OF UPCOMING ENVIRONMENTAL EVENTS

SEJ MEMBERSHIP INFORMATION

LINK TO THE NEW WEB SITE OF THE INTERNATIONAL FEDERATION OF ENVIRONMENTAL JOURNALISTS
